utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with detailed information. Each item contains the specified details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental coverage and cost-related info (deductible, limit, compliance); property_coverage covers home contents and business equipment with coverage limit; travel_coverage includes global and adventure travel with detailed features and coverage limit; additional_services includes enhancement services with explicit cost statement; total_budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance categories plus additional services. For health_coverage, it explicitly lists both 'physical' and 'mental' types, so we map these to the best-matching plans from the ground-truth ratings. Based on the ideal_insurance_profile and matching coverage features (preventive care, psychiatry services, crisis intervention, 24/7 emergency support), the correct mapping is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for physical health (rating 10) and 'CareCo Basic Plan' for mental health (rating 10). For property_coverage, the features (liability protection, natural disaster coverage, temporary accommodation, electronics included) match 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 10). For travel_coverage, the global/adventure coverage with emergency coordination and medical evacuation matches 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10). The additional_services section includes 'Volunteer work coverage', 'Specialized rescue services', 'Extended international stay', and '24/7 multilingual support'. These align most closely with the 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10) and are consistent with the ideal_insurance_profile essential add-ons. Therefore, all selected items correspond to the highest-rated, most suitable options for the user's profile.
